overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a foggy night walk through an industrial district. The camera follows a character past a massive satellite dish, through a covered loading facility, and across a rain-slicked street with neon-lit warehouses in the background.

black SUV drives past on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy industrial street toward the large satellite dish structure

wet asphalt road surface reflecting street lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial street at night, with a massive satellite dish dominating the skyline. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt road, with street lights cutting through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered loading dock with red steel support beams

events.description: enters the covered loading dock area beneath the industrial building
exits the covered structure back into the open street

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered industrial loading area with red support beams

entered.detail: industrial loading bay with overhead roof structure
painted red structural support columns lining the walkway
bright industrial lighting fixtures mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a covered loading dock area, sheltered from the foggy night. Red steel beams and overhead fluorescent lights line the concrete walkway as the character passes through the industrial structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with neon signage and concrete barriers

events.description: passes two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past industrial warehouses with neon signs

dark metal warehouse building with small illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered structure, the scene reveals an industrial sidewalk lined with concrete barriers. The DYCLOUD neon sign glows in the foggy distance as the camera passes two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with traffic control and crosswalk

events.description: begins crossing the street at the crosswalk
traffic light changes from red to green, vehicles start moving

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian across the street at the traffic light

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking ahead toward the crosswalk
sedan waiting at the red light before proceeding on green

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red then changing to green
white painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a pedestrian toward an intersection, then begins crossing the street as the traffic light changes from red to green. A sedan waits at the light before driving through the intersection as the character completes the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial district at night, transitioning from an open street into a sheltered facility before returning to a neon-lit intersection. It begins on a wet sidewalk beneath the looming silhouette of a massive satellite dish, moving forward as street lights pierce through the dense haze and vehicles pass on the asphalt. The camera then glides into a covered loading dock, where the open fog is replaced by the structured environment of red steel beams and overhead fluorescent lighting. As the camera exits the structure, the scene opens back onto a concrete walkway where the glow of a distant DYCLOUD neon sign emerges through the mist and pedestrians pass in the opposite direction. Finally, the movement follows a pedestrian toward a street crossing, pausing as a traffic light shifts from red to green and a sedan drives through the intersection.
